title: Golden Heads
description: A True Golden Head Plugin where every kill by a player drops a Head and you can craft a golden head with gold surrounding a head
body:
# **THIS PROJECT ISN'T MANTAINED AT ALL, PLEASE SEARCH MODRINTH FOR OTHER GOLDEN HEAD DATAPACKS**

- This datapack adds golden heads (Like from uhc servers).
- Golden heads add golden heads which you could eat for regen 3 and absorption 5, Longer Fire Res & Regular Res.
- You could craft them from gold surrounding a head. Every player drops a head on death by another player.

- **Credit to Vanilla Tweaks for allowing people to use their projects for the community. I Used Vanilla Tweaks Player Head Drop for the head dropping**

**Crafting Recipe:**

![Gold Surrounding A Player Head](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0aca73c191118ee0ff6214a9ab7a114fb952025a.png)

## **THIS IS INCOMPATIBLE WITH SPIGOT/BUKKIT, PLEASE USE PAPERMC**
